'''chadhaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacreator|vacreator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacreator|vacreator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chadhaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chædhægæth|chædhægæth]] || [[word:chædhægæj|chædhægæj]] || [[word:chædhægæsh|chædhægæsh]] || [[word:chædhægæ|chædhægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chadhadhagath|chadhadhagath]] || [[word:chadhadhagaj|chadhadhagaj]] || [[word:chadhadhagash|chadhadhagash]] || [[word:chadhadhaga|chadhadhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chadhagath|chadhagath]] || [[word:chadhagaj|chadhagaj]] || [[word:chadhagash|chadhagash]] || [[word:chadhaga|chadhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chadhafgath|chadhafgath]] || [[word:chadhafgaj|chadhafgaj]] || [[word:chadhafgash|chadhafgash]] || [[word:chadhafgaf|chadhafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chadhagatha|chadhagatha]] || [[word:chadhagaja|chadhagaja]] || [[word:chadhagasha|chadhagasha]] || [[word:chadhagaka|chadhagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chadhagath|chadhagath]] || [[word:chadhagaj|chadhagaj]] || [[word:chadhagash|chadhagash]] || [[word:chadhaga|chadhaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chadhagathal|chadhagathal]] || [[word:chadhagajal|chadhagajal]] || [[word:chadhagashal|chadhagashal]] || [[word:chadhagakal|chadhagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chadhagathatha|chadhagathatha]] || [[word:chadhagajaja|chadhagajaja]] || [[word:chadhagashasha|chadhagashasha]] || [[word:chadhagaka|chadhagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chadhagathan|chadhagathan]] || [[word:chadhagajan|chadhagajan]] || [[word:chadhagashan|chadhagashan]] || [[word:chadhagakan|chadhagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chadhagathaoro|chadhagathaoro]] || [[word:chadhagajaoro|chadhagajaoro]] || [[word:chadhagashaoro|chadhagashaoro]] || [[word:chadhagakaoro|chadhagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
